lesson.menu_desc: Like / don't like + food words -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- Food I Like -- Like / don't like + food vocabulary
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Sandra Hayasaki | Aula 5 -- Food I Like

listenings.text: Hi, I am Mark. Let me tell you about the food I like. I love coffee. I drink three cups every day. For lunch, I like chicken with rice. It is my favorite meal. I also like fish, but only on weekends. I eat a lot of fruit because it is healthy. I eat an apple every morning. I do not like salad very much, but my wife loves it. And I drink a lot of water during the day. Good food makes me happy.

Hello, my name is Anna. I want to tell you about my favorite food. In the morning, I eat bread with fruit, and I drink coffee. I like a big breakfast. For lunch, I usually eat fish with a green salad. I really like fresh salad. I do not like chicken, so I never order it. When I go to a restaurant, I always ask for water. My favorite restaurant is near my house. The food there is delicious. I am very happy when I eat good food.

extra_audio.text: Sandra goes to a restaurant with Mark. She looks at the menu. She orders chicken with rice. Mark asks for a coffee. They are very happy with the food.
